inputs.label: Energy Consumed
inputs.businessContext: Total energy consumed in kilowatt-hours over the measurement period. Based on ISO 50001 energy management standard.

inputs.label: Production Output
inputs.businessContext: Total units produced in the same period. Used to calculate energy intensity per unit.

inputs.label: Operating Hours
inputs.businessContext: Total operating hours of the facility or equipment during the measurement period.

inputs.label: Energy Cost per kWh
inputs.businessContext: Average cost of energy per kilowatt-hour. Used to calculate total energy cost.

inputs.label: Baseline Energy Intensity
inputs.businessContext: Industry benchmark or historical baseline energy intensity for comparison. Based on ISO 50001 energy performance indicators.

inputs.label: Data Confidence Level
inputs.businessContext: Confidence in the accuracy of input data. Affects adjustment of results. Low confidence reduces reliability.

hiddenLossDrivers: energyIntensityRatio > 1.2 ? 'Critical: Energy intensity exceeds baseline by more than 20%' : (energyIntensityRatio > 1.1 ? 'Warning: Energy intensity exceeds baseline by more than 10%' : '')
suggestedActions: energyIntensityRatio > 1.2 ? 'Conduct energy audit and implement efficiency measures' : (energyIntensityRatio > 1.1 ? 'Review operational practices for energy savings' : 'Maintain current energy performance')
